prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华中科技大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约635名、547名、450名、495名、467名。2021至2023年呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加 剧），2024年小幅回落至495名，2025年回升至467名。近五年位次波动区间为450–635名，整体处于高位竞争区间，2025年基准位次为467名；该校在海南省综合 类招生计划：2021年47人、2022–2024年各50人、2025年51人。2026年招生计划为43人，较2025年减少8人，降幅约15.7%，属于明显缩招。缩招将直接推高录取竞争强 度，使最低位次数字趋于减小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校。软科中国大学排名2021–2024年位列第8名，2025–2026年位列第9名，稳居 全国顶尖高校行列，对考生具有极强的吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要正面信号包括：华中科技大学食堂在全国高校中排名第一（约35个食堂，人均消 费8–15元），受到学生广泛好评；招生透明度高，复试细则公开。抖音热度总排名第22位，评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度持续升温。未见投档线异常或断档 记录；第五轮学科评估中，A+学科3个（机械工程、光学工程、电气工程），A学科4个（动力工程及工程热物理、控制科学与工程、材料科学与工程、物理学、 计算机科学与技术、管理科学与工程），A-学科8个（临床医学、公共卫生与预防医学、化学、基础医学、工商管理、新闻传播学、生物医学工程、生物学），A-及以上共计17个 学科，学科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等华科优势专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均被评为"高热推 荐"或"推荐"，社会关注度持续走高。海南省考生总数从2021年52977人持续增长至2025年67408人，2026年预计约78000人（增长约15.7%），考生规模扩大加剧了全省范围内的录 取竞争。，未出现大幅波动；华中科技大学位于湖北省武汉市，属中部地区顶尖高校。该校在海南省招生计划相对稳定 （近年40–51人），本地无同类层次高校竞争，跨省报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次467名、2026年招生计划缩招15.7%（51人→43人）、海南省考生总数增长 约15.7%、学校声誉偏正面且抖音热度较热、优势学科众多且专业热度高等因素，录取竞争强度预计进一步加剧。，结合考生规模扩大和声誉热度 上升等额外竞争压力，预测2026年最低录取位次约为403名，区间为375–431名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）

- 自动化类

- 计算机类（网安学院）
- 电子信息类（电信学院）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在403名左右，区间375–431名。建议位次在375名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（光电启明实验班、计算机学院、电气工程等）；位次在375–431名之间的考生以 二档专业为主力选择（机械类、自动化类、电子信息类、数学类等），同时可尝试冲刺一档部分专业；位次在431名以外的考生建议以三档专业保底（临床医学、口腔医学等）， 并关注该校在海南的招生计划变化。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 635, 547, 450, 495, and 467 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, there was a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, intensifying competition). In 2024, it slightly dropped to 495, and in 2025, it rebounded to 467. Over the past five years, the ranking fluctuation range was 450–635, overall in a high-competition range, with a baseline ranking of 467 in 2025. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province: 47 in 2021, 50 each in 2022–2024, and 51 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan is 43, a decrease of 8 from 2025, a reduction of about 15.7%, which is a significant contraction. This contraction will directly increase the intensity of admission competition, causing the minimum ranking number to decrease.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 8th from 2021 to 2024 and 9th from 2025 to 2026, firmly among the top universities in the country, exerting strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is relatively positive. Major positive signals include: Huazhong University of Science and Technology's canteens rank first among universities nationwide (about 35 canteens, per capita consumption 8–15 yuan), receiving widespread praise from students; high admission transparency, with detailed re-examination procedures disclosed. On Douyin, it ranks 22nd in overall popularity, rated as "relatively hot," with high short video exposure, reflecting increasing attention from applicants. No abnormal admission cutoffs or gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 3 A+ disciplines (Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 4 A disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Physics, Computer Science and Technology, Management Science and Engineering), and 8 A- disciplines (Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Chemistry, Basic Medicine, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Biomedical Engineering, Biology), totaling 17 disciplines at A- or above. The disciplinary strength is extremely prominent, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: HUST's advantageous majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering have been rated as "highly recommended" or "recommended" in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with continuously high social attention. The total number of candidates in Hainan Province has grown steadily from 52,977 in 2021 to 67,408 in 2025, and is expected to be about 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7%). The expansion of the candidate pool has intensified admission competition across the province. No significant fluctuations have occurred. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, a top university in the central region. Its enrollment plan in Hainan Province is relatively stable (40–51 in recent years), with no similar-level universities competing locally, and cross-provincial application popularity is high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 467 in 2025, the 15.7% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (51→43), the approximately 15.7% increase in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province, the relatively positive school reputation and hot Douyin popularity, numerous advantageous disciplines and high major popularity, the intensity of admission competition is expected to further intensify. Combined with additional competitive pressures such as the expansion of the candidate pool and increased reputation popularity, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 403, with a range of 375–431.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering (Optoelectronic Fusion Chip Qiming Experimental Class)
- Automation (Unmanned Systems Qiming Experimental Class)
- Computer Science (School of Computer Science)
- Aerospace Engineering
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Automation
- Electronic Information (School of Integrated Circuits)
- Computer Science (School of Cyber Science and Engineering)
- Electronic Information (School of Electronic Information and Communications)
- Mathematics
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 403, with a range of 375–431. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 375 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Optoelectronic Qiming Experimental Class, School of Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, etc.); candidates with rankings between 375–431 should primarily consider Tier 2 majors (Mechanical Engineering, Automation, Electronic Information, Mathematics, etc.) as their main choices, while also attempting to sprint for some Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings outside 431 are advised to use Tier 3 majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, etc.) as safety options, and pay attention to changes in the university's enrollment plan in Hainan.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年至2025年，华中科技大学在海南省医学类最低录取位次分别为6216位（计划7人）、3344位（计划8人）、3665位（计划9人）、2406位（计划6人）、2035位（计划12人） 。整体呈波动下降趋势，位次数字从6216降至2035，表明医学类录取门槛逐年提高、竞争加剧。2025年计划大幅扩招至12人，但位次反而降至2035，反映报考热度高涨。2026年医 学类招生计划为10人，较2025年减少2人，缩招幅度约16.7%，对位次产生下行压力（位次数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家'985工程''211工程'重点建设高校，入选'双一流'建设高校。其同济医学院是国内顶尖医学院校之一，临床医学等学科实力位居 全国前列，对高分考生具有极强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在海南省持续保持高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业尤其受到考生青睐。华中科技大学同济医学院作为国内顶级医学殿堂，对海南优秀生源吸引力强劲。2 026年医学类仅设临床医学（含卓越医师启明实验班）和法医学三个招生专业，总计划10人，名额有限进一步加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势分析，预测2026年华中科技大学在海南省医学类最低录取位次约为1872名，波动区间为1722至2022名。2026年缩招使位次理论上有所前 移（更难进），但医学持续高热度的趋势对位次形成支撑，预计录取难度较2025年略有上升。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（卓越医师启明实验班）
- 临床医学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内，建议以临床医学类专业为主攻方向，法医学作为稳妥保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest admission rankings for Medicine at Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Hainan Province were 6216 (plan 7), 3344 (plan 8), 3665 (plan 9), 2406 (plan 6), and 2035 (plan 12), respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating downward trend, with rankings dropping from 6216 to 2035, indicating that admission thresholds for Medicine have been increasing year by year and competition has intensified. In 2025, the plan significantly expanded to 12 students, but the ranking dropped to 2035, reflecting high application enthusiasm. In 2026, the enrollment plan for Medicine is 10 students, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a reduction of about 16.7%, which puts downward pressure on rankings (ranking numbers decrease).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with clinical medicine and other disciplines ranking among the top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application enthusiasm in Hainan Province, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology particularly favored by candidates. As a top medical institution in China, Tongji Medical College of Huazhong University of Science and Technology has a strong appeal to outstanding students from Hainan. In 2026, Medicine only offers three admission majors: Clinical Medicine (including the Outstanding Physician Qiming Experimental Class) and Forensic Medicine, with a total plan of 10 students, further intensifying competition due to limited slots.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the lowest admission ranking for Medicine at Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Hainan Province in 2026 will be approximately 1872, with a fluctuation range of 1722 to 2022. The enrollment reduction in 2026 theoretically moves the ranking forward (harder to enter), but the sustained high popularity of Medicine supports the ranking, and the admission difficulty is expected to be slightly higher than in 2025.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Physician Qiming Experimental Class)
- Clinical Medicine
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on clinical medicine majors as the main direction, with forensic medicine as a safe backup choice.
